name: Multicorn Shield
description: AI agent governance for OpenClaw. Checks permissions, logs actions, and enforces controls via the Shield API.

apiKey.label: Multicorn API Key
apiKey.help: Your Multicorn Shield API key (or use ${MULTICORN_API_KEY})

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Shield API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.multicorn.ai

agentName.label: Agent Name
agentName.help: Override the agent name in the Shield dashboard

failMode.label: Fail Mode
failMode.help: open = allow tool calls when API is unreachable. closed = block them.
